title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
